summary: Roster Bulk Actions - All tests PASSED. Backend: 15/15 tests passed (3 skipped for coach permission). Frontend: All 12 UI tests passed. Features verified: Checkbox selection, bulk action bar appears with count, Assign Coach modal with dropdown, Send Reminder modal with text input, Add Note modal with text input, X button clears selection, view switcher (Team/Coach/Age), search filter.
critical_code_review_comments: Code quality is excellent - BulkActionBar, BulkAssignModal, BulkTextModal components are clean and reusable
Proper state management with selectedIds Set and proper clearing after successful actions
Backend endpoints properly validate required fields and return meaningful error messages
Director-only access properly enforced via _require_director() helper
seed_data_creation: None - used existing athlete and coach data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Roster bulk actions fully verified and working. (1) Checkboxes select athletes - data-testid='select-{athlete.id}'. (2) Bulk action bar appears when selectedIds.size > 0 - data-testid='bulk-action-bar'. Shows count like '2 selected'. (3) Assign Coach - data-testid='bulk-assign' opens BulkAssignModal with coach dropdown (data-testid='bulk-assign-select'). (4) Send Reminder - data-testid='bulk-reminder' opens BulkTextModal with textarea (data-testid='bulk-text-input'). (5) Add Note - data-testid='bulk-note' opens same BulkTextModal. (6) X button clears selection. (7) Success toasts show on completion. (8) View switcher (Team/Coach/Age) and search filter working. All 3 backend endpoints confirmed working: POST /api/roster/bulk-assign, POST /api/roster/bulk-remind, POST /api/roster/bulk-note.

checkbox_selection.details: Clicking checkboxes selects athletes, bulk action bar shows correct count

bulk_action_bar.details: Sticky bar appears with 'X selected', buttons for Assign Coach, Send Reminder, Add Note

assign_coach_modal.details: Modal opens with coach dropdown, selecting coach and confirming works, success toast shown

send_reminder_modal.details: Modal opens with text input for message, confirming sends reminder, success toast shown

add_note_modal.details: Modal opens with text input for note, confirming adds note, success toast shown

clear_selection.details: X button clears selection and hides bulk action bar

view_switcher.details: Team View (3 groups), Coach View (7 groups), Age Group View (3 groups) all switch correctly

search_filter.details: Searching 'Marcus' filters to 1 athlete, clearing shows all 25

error_handling.details: Missing athlete_ids, coach_id, note returns 400. Invalid coach returns 404. Unauthenticated returns 401.
